title: BindWeb hotbar
description: Instantly place cobwebs from your hotbar with a single keybind — perfect for PvP and quick traps!
body:
BindWeb Hotbar is a lightweight and convenient mod that lets you place cobwebs instantly with a single keybind — no need to switch items!

✨ Features:

Places cobwebs directly from your hotbar (not from inventory).

Works without changing your held item.

Perfect for PvP, traps, and quick defenses.

Fully compatible with other Fabric mods for Minecraft 1.16.5.

🎮 Why download:
If you often use cobwebs for PvP or defense, this mod saves precious seconds. Just press your keybind — and the web is placed instantly!
